Module kivakit.microservice
Package com.telenav.kivakit.microservice.protocols.grpc

com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.repeaters.BaseRepeater

All Implemented Interfaces:
com.telenav.kivakit.component.Component, com.telenav.kivakit.core.function.ResultTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.core.language.trait.LanguageTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.core.language.trait.SilentTryTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.core.language.trait.TryTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Broadcaster, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Listener, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Repeater, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Transceiver, com.telenav.kivakit.core.project.ProjectTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.core.registry.RegistryTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.core.vm.JavaTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.code.TripwireTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.messaging.Receiver, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.messaging.Transmitter, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.naming.NamedObject, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.packages.PackageTrait, com.telenav.kivakit.settings.SettingsTrait
public class MicroserviceGrpcClient extends com.telenav.kivakit.component.BaseComponent
Client for sending microservlet requests to a microservice via GRPC.
Author:
jonathanl (shibo)

  • Constructor Details

    • MicroserviceGrpcClient

      public MicroserviceGrpcClient(com.telenav.kivakit.network.core.Port port, com.telenav.kivakit.core.version.Version version)
      Parameters:
      port - The GRPC server port
      version - The default version to use for non-absolute request paths (paths not starting with a slash). For example, if version is 1.0, a request path of "testing" would resolve to "/api/1.0/testing".

  • Method Details

    • request

      public <T extends MicroservletResponse> T request(String path, MicroservletRequest request, Class<T> responseType)
      Performs a blocking GRPC call to the given path with the given request object
      Parameters:
      path - The resource path
      request - The request object
      responseType - The response type
      Returns:
      The response

    • requestFuture

      public <T extends MicroservletResponse> MicroservletFutureResponse<T> requestFuture(String path, MicroservletRequest request, Class<T> responseType)
      Performs a blocking GRPC call to the given path with the given request object

      request - The request object
      responseType - The response type
      Returns:
      The response
